user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to add a new resume to the talent pool, so that I can build a bank of candidates for future roles
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Talent Pool screen; When I click Add new resume and enter the candidate details; Then the candidate is saved to the resume bank and listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to search candidates by name, position and folder, so that I can quickly find suitable candidates in the talent pool
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Talent Pool screen; When I enter a candidate name or position and click Search; Then only matching candidates are displayed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to reset my search filters, so that I can start a new candidate search from the full list
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied search filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters clear and the full candidate list is shown

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to filter candidates by review status using the Not Reviewed, Reviewed and All tabs, so that I can prioritise candidates who still need screening
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Talent Pool screen; When I click a status tab such as Not Reviewed (28); Then only candidates in that review state are listed with a matching count

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to select candidates and assign them to folder(s), so that I can organise the talent pool by role or campaign
acceptance_criteria: Given I have selected one or more candidates; When I choose Assign to folder(s), select folders and click Submit; Then the candidates are added to the chosen folders

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to filter the pool by selecting one or more folders, so that I can view only candidates within a specific folder
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Talent Pool screen; When I use Select Folder(s) and choose folders; Then the list shows only candidates in the selected folders

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view candidate details including email, contact number, applied position, applied date, interview status, communication status and source, so that I can assess and contact candidates
acceptance_criteria: Given candidates exist in the talent pool; When the list loads; Then each row shows name, email, contact number, position applied for, applicable folders, applied date, interview status, communication status, created by and source
